scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run build --workspace @viscontext/web
scripts.check: npm run generate && npm run test && npm run check --workspace @viscontext/web && npm run build --workspace @viscontext/web && npm run validate:html
scripts.dev: npm run generate && npm run dev --workspace @viscontext/web
scripts.dev:local: npm run generate && concurrently --kill-others --success first --names firebase,web "npm run emulators" "npm run dev --workspace @viscontext/web -- --host 127.0.0.1"
